name: Summer & Trips
description: Fun and easy questions about summer, nature and family trips. Perfect for younger kids.

stations.title: Sky light
stations.questionText: What big bright star do we see in the sky on a sunny summer day?

stations.title: Beach gear
stations.questionText: What do you put on your skin to protect it from the sun?

stations.title: Cool treat
stations.questionText: What frozen sweet treat melts fast on a hot day?

stations.title: Pack smart
stations.questionText: What do you wear over your eyes to block bright sunlight?

stations.title: Water fun
stations.questionText: What do you wear to go swimming in the sea or pool?
stations.correctAnswer: swimsuit, bathing suit, swimming suit, trunks

stations.title: Camp night
stations.questionText: What do you sleep in when you go camping outdoors?

stations.title: Nature walk
stations.questionText: What do we call a long walk in nature, often up a hill or mountain?

stations.title: Buzzy bug
stations.questionText: Which insect makes honey and can sometimes sting in summer?

stations.title: Road trip
stations.questionText: What do we call the bag you pack your clothes in for a trip?

stations.title: Team photo
stations.questionText: MISSION: Take a photo of your whole group jumping in the air at the same time!
